source_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical section in CORE-Vocabulary.md, fence-to-fence inclusive. Recomputed on every regen. Mismatch triggers DEGRADED loader mode per ADR-023 D4.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent `core-admin intent sync vocabulary` run that produced this file.

generator_version.description: Version string of the regen command that produced this file. Format: semver or git short-sha of the CLI package.

term.description: The canonical term, exactly as it must appear in papers and code.

definition.description: One or two sentences. What this term means in CORE. Precise enough to distinguish it from adjacent terms.

not.description: What this term must not be confused with. Explicit disambiguation.

authoritative_paper.description: Path to the governing document that is the authoritative source for this term. Must resolve to an existing file within the governed tree (.specs/ or .intent/). In case of conflict between this file and the paper, the paper wins.

aliases.description: Other terms in use that map to this canonical term. Listed here so they can be detected and corrected.

see_also.description: Related terms defined elsewhere in this document.
